# openshift_compatibility (Data Source)

Returns the provider's OCP compatibility matrix.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `matrix` (Attributes List) List of OCP version compatibility entries. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--matrix))

<a id="nestedatt--matrix"></a>
### Nested Schema for `matrix`

Read-Only:

- `broken` (Boolean)
- `broken_reason` (String)
- `k8s_api_versions` (List of String)
- `min_oc_mirror` (String)
- `min_provider_ver` (String)
- `ocp_version` (String)
